name: Route-To-Credit
description_short: Route-To-Credit is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 5.0/5 with 18 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Route-To-Credit is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 18 reviews, Route-To-Credit has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Philadelphia area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Route-To-Credit specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Route-To-Credit operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Route-To-Credit should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
